name: Mirror Abyss / 镜渊
validation: deployment syntax/version checks plus worldbook verification, event continuity, idempotency, vector fallback and live UI state tests passed
limitations: Original TypeScript project, package manifest and full source test suite were not present in the uploaded deploy archive.
fixes: persist actual server-readback fingerprint, managed entry count and verification version after lorebook commit
revalidate latest committed lorebook on startup, chat switch, focus and explicit UI action
overlay live task-queue state onto message panels instead of waiting for artifact persistence
skip duplicate automatic processing when the same approved正文 already has a successful fact table
preserve event identity when the model emits a new ID for one uniquely matching existing event
downgrade vector-trigger documents to keyword triggers only when vector capability is explicitly unavailable
diagnose server drift and duplicate event identities from one shared state source
